key_drivers: Iran war / Strait of Hormuz disruption: OPEC output -7.3M bpd, WTI +94% YTD — dominant bullish driver for CL
Fed hawkish hold + USD safe-haven surge (DXY ~100.5): headwind for gold, equities, and commodity currencies
BoJ hawkish tilt (69% probability Apr 28 hike) + risk-off VIX 23.87: bullish 6J (JPY safe haven + rate convergence)
GDPNow Q1 2026 slowing to 1.64%: slight growth concern supporting steepening yield curve (+53bps 2s10s)

fallbacks_used: News sources for VIX level (23.87 per capitalstreetfx weekly report)
Seeking Alpha/Withum for HY OAS (~309bps, flat)
Multiple news sources for DXY (~100.08-100.50, rising)
Atlanta Fed GDPNow via Seeking Alpha/Threads (1.64% Q1 2026)
Reuters/OPEC survey for oil supply disruption (OPEC -7.3M bpd)
